title: Paw Patrol: Mission Big Screen
overview: There's no screen too big and no pup too small in this 'Pawsome' cinema experience. Join Ryder, Chase, Marshall, Skye and the rest of the PAW Patrol as they take on em'bark' on adventures in Adventure Bay and beyond.
